title: Kannadasan Karaikudi Lyrics Anjathe
stanzas:
kannadasan kaaraikudi
perai solli oothikudi
kunnakudi machaanai pol
paadaporendaa (2)

kannadi kopaiyila
kanna moodi neechaladi
oorugaaya thottukittaa
odi pogum kaichaladi

podhai enbadhu
oru paambu vishaamthaan
serndhu kudichaa
adhu oru socialism-thaan

pondaati pullainga
thollainga illaa idam
indha idam thaane.

indha idam illaiyina
saami madam thaane
mesthiri kalava kadanthu
kudikkiraare
siththaale ponna nenachu
idikkuraare

nooru milliya adichaa
podhai illaiye
oora thaandunaa
nadakka paadha illaiye

annanum thambiyum
ellarum inge vandhaa
dappaankuthu thaane
overaa aachuthuna
vettu kuthu thaane

engalukku thanniyila
kandamilla engalukku
jaaathi madham rendumilla
katchikaara machi
enna aachu
vaeti avundhu pochu

roatu kadaiyila
manushan jaaliya paaru
saettu kadaiyila
manaivi thaaliya paaru

kannadasan kaaraikudi
perai solli oothikudi
kunnakudi machaanai pol
paadaporendaa (2)

kannadi kopaiyila
kanna moodi neechaladi
oorugaaya thottukittaa
odi pogum kaichaladi

podhai enbadhu
oru paambu vishaamthaan
serndhu kudichaa
adhu oru socialism-thaan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kannadasan Karaikudi?

The song reflects on nostalgia and introspection, capturing a deep sense of longing and reflection.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics were penned by Kabilan.

In which movie does this song appear?

The song is featured in the movie Anjathe.

Who performed Kannadasan Karaikudi?

The song was performed by Mysskin.

When was the movie Anjathe released?

The movie was released in 2008.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kannadasan Karaikudi from the movie Anjathe is a reflective piece that delves into themes of nostalgia and introspection. Sung by Mysskin, the lyrics by Kabilan evoke a deep sense of longing and contemplation. The song's mood is melancholic yet soothing, making it perfect for moments of reflection. It captures the essence of looking back at one's past with a mix of emotions, making it a memorable addition to the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Dive into the reflective world of Kannadasan Karaikudi from the movie Anjathe. This song, penned by Kabilan and sung by Mysskin, captures a unique blend of nostalgia and introspection. Experience the evocative lyrics that resonate with the soul, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: Mention the name Kannadasan from Karaikudi and sing like Kunnakudi Machaan.
Close your eyes with glasses and swim. If you touch the wound, the fever will run away.
Intoxication is like snake venom. If you drink it together, it's like socialism.
There is no place without wife and kids, this is the place.
If this place is not there, then it's the temple. The worker crosses the river and drinks, thinking of a girl.
Look over there, the director is complaining.
Even if you hit a hundred million, there's no intoxication. If you cross the town, there's no path to walk.
If brothers come here, it's all about dancing. If it gets over, it's all about cutting and stabbing.
We don't have any problem with water. We don't have caste or religion. What happened to the political guy? His dhoti is gone.
Look at the man happily in the roadside shop. Look at the wife with the necklace in the shop.
Mention the name Kannadasan from Karaikudi and sing like Kunnakudi Machaan.
Close your eyes with glasses and swim. If you touch the wound, the fever will run away.
Intoxication is like snake venom. If you drink it together, it's like socialism.
